# ImmediateScheduler.SchedulerTimeType.Stride

**Structure**

The increment by which the immediate scheduler counts time.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Stride
```

## Creating Scheduler Time Strides

- **init(_:)**: Creates an immediate scheduler time interval from the given time interval.
- **init(exactly:)**: Creates an immediate scheduler time interval from a binary integer type.
- **init(floatLiteral:)**: Creates an immediate scheduler time interval from a floating-point seconds value.
- **init(integerLiteral:)**: Creates an immediate scheduler time interval from an integer seconds value.

## Creating Scheduler Time Strides from Seconds

- **microseconds(_:)**: Converts the specified number of microseconds into an instance of this scheduler time type.
- **milliseconds(_:)**: Converts the specified number of milliseconds into an instance of this scheduler time type.
- **nanoseconds(_:)**: Converts the specified number of nanoseconds into an instance of this scheduler time type.
- **seconds(_:)**: Converts the specified number of seconds, as a floating-point value, into an instance of this scheduler time type.
- **seconds(_:)**: Converts the specified number of seconds into an instance of this scheduler time type.

## Declaring Timekeeping Types

- **ImmediateScheduler.SchedulerTimeType.Stride.FloatLiteralType**: The type used when evaluating floating-point literals.
- **ImmediateScheduler.SchedulerTimeType.Stride.IntegerLiteralType**: The type used when evaluating integer literals.
- **ImmediateScheduler.SchedulerTimeType.Stride.Magnitude**: The type used for expressing the stride’s magnitude.

## Expressing Scheduler Time Strides as Seconds

- **magnitude**: The value of this time interval in seconds.

## Conforms To

- AdditiveArithmetic
- Comparable
- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- ExpressibleByFloatLiteral
- ExpressibleByIntegerLiteral
- Numeric
- SchedulerTimeIntervalConvertible
- SignedNumeric
